entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where agricultural productivity and rural poverty were analyzed.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The level and variation of agricultural performance across districts and regions.

entities.name: RURAL POVERTY
entities.description: The state of poverty in rural areas, linked to agricultural productivity and employment.

entities.name: LAND PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output per unit of land, a key factor affecting rural poverty.

entities.name: LABOUR PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output per unit of labour, a factor affecting rural poverty.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: A major determinant of agricultural productivity levels and variations.

entities.name: FERTILIZER-USE
entities.description: A major determinant of agricultural productivity levels and variations.

entities.name: ECONOMETRIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The statistical method used to analyze the linkages between agricultural productivity and poverty.

entities.name: NON-FARM EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: Employment opportunities outside of agriculture, suggested to be strengthened to reduce poverty.

entities.name: INCOME OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: Ways to earn money, suggested to be improved alongside farm productivity.

entities.name: RESOURCE DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of diversifying resources towards high-value crops.

entities.name: HIGH-VALUE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that provide higher economic returns, such as fruits and vegetables.

entities.name: FRUITS
entities.description: Examples of high-value crops used for agricultural diversification.

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Examples of high-value crops used for agricultural diversification.

entities.name: NON-FARM ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Economic activities not related to farming, required for reducing rural poverty.

entities.name: PUBLIC INVESTMENT
entities.description: Government spending used to encourage irrigation and agricultural diversification.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of diversifying agricultural production to improve productivity and reduce poverty.
